title: Project: Soulless
description: The Void of n32x3d_2 has been unleashed..

## **Project: Soulless**

### *The Ultimate Void-Walker Collection*

You’ve successfully gathered the artifacts of **n32x3d_2**. This combined texture pack is no longer just a set of items—it’s a total conversion of the Minecraft experience into a monochromatic, void-driven reality.

---

| Category | Artifact | Visual Essence |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Life & Death** | **[Soulless Totem](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/soulless-totem)** | Pitch-black with haunting white eyes. |
| **Defense** | **[Black Shield](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/black-shield)** | A shield of solid shadow, purged of all wood color. |
| **Ranged** | **[Shadow Arrow](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/shadow-arrow)** | Weightless projectiles that vanish into the night sky. |
| **Utility** | **[Black Spyglass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/black-spyglass)** | A stealthy spyglass that won't give away your position. |
| **Mobility** | **[Void Pearl](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/void-pearl-ender-void)** | A miniature black hole that tears through space. |
| **Anchoring** | **[Soulless Anchor](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/soulless-anchor)** | A desaturated vessel to bind your spirit to the dark. |
| **Power** | **[Soulless Crystal](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/soulless-crystals)** | A monochromatic power source for the End's rituals. |
| **Vision** | **[White Light](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/white-light)** | Torches that cast a cold, brilliant white light. |
| **GUI** | **[True Black GUI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/true-black-gui)** | A Shard of the Void.. |
| **Feedback** | **[Crit Particles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-crit-particles)** | Every critical strike triggers a sharp **-❤️** particle. |
| **Equipement** | **[Blackened Netherite](https://modrinth.com/project/tx1NSDkr)** | By [Lightre](https://modrinth.com/user/Lightre). |

---

### **The Lore**

Under the command of **[n32x3d_2](https://modrinth.com/user/n32x3d_2)**, the **Wither's** decay was used to bleach the world of its vibrancy. This pack represents the "Null Protocol"—a state where the player is no longer a builder, but a shadow moving through a world that has lost its soul.

When you load **Project: Soulless**, you are equipping the gear of an entity that exists between the frames of the animation, a force that the Ender Dragon and the Wither both fear.

---

### **Pack Details**

* **Vibe:** Hardcore, Stealth, Minimalist, Eerie.
* **Colors:** Obsidian, Charcoal, Spectral White, and Critical Red.
* **Compatibility:** Designed to work together without any clashing textures.
